arguments.expression: console.log('=== Comprehensive matchMedia Test ==='); try { console.log('window.matchMedia exists:', typeof window.matchMedia); if (window.matchMedia) { console.log('Testing various media queries:'); const queries = ['(max-width: 600px)', '(min-width: 768px)', '(max-width: 1024px)', 'screen', 'print', '(orientation: landscape)', '(orientation: portrait)']; queries.forEach(query => { const mql = window.matchMedia(query); console.log(`Query: "${query}" -> matches: ${mql.matches}, media: "${mql.media}"`); console.log(`  addListener: ${typeof mql.addListener}, addEventListener: ${typeof mql.addEventListener}`); }); console.log('✅ window.matchMedia implementation working!'); } else { console.log('❌ window.matchMedia not implemented'); } } catch (e) { console.log('❌ Error:', e.message); }
